description: Legal document. Dating: Late 18th century or early 19th century, based on the mention of Me'ir b. Naʿim. Yaʿaqov Ḥasūn attests that he received a three-month investment from Me'ir ben Naʿim of 45 reales, one real being equal to 90 silver medins. Half of the monthly profit that accrues from this money, up to 67 medins, shall be paid to Me'ir ben Naʿim, and Yaʿaqov will retain the other half.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
